heading: Criminal penalty
label: 1350 Criminal penalty
text: An officer or employee of the United States Government or of the District of Columbia government knowingly and willfully violating section 1341(a) or 1342 of this title shall be fined not more than $5,000, imprisoned for not more than 2 years, or both.

Code. The words “upon conviction” are omitted as surplus.
